ScalarVariable.description: 1=Cobre, 2=PVC, 3=HDPE, 4=Valco

ScalarVariable.name: pump.energyDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of energy balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: pump.init
ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (no init/steady state/initial state/initial output)

ScalarVariable.name: pump.inputType
ScalarVariable.description: Control input type

ScalarVariable.name: pump.massDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of mass balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state, must be steady state if energyDynamics is steady state

ScalarVariable.description: Efficiency computation method for the hydraulic efficiency etaHyd

ScalarVariable.name: pump.per.etaMotMet
ScalarVariable.description: Efficiency computation method for the motor efficiency etaMot

ScalarVariable.name: pump.substanceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of independent mass fraction balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: pump.traceDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of trace substance balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (InitialState and InitialOutput are identical)

ScalarVariable.name: SenTempIn_cold.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: SenTempIn_cold.transferHeat
ScalarVariable.description: if true, temperature T converges towards TAmb when no flow

ScalarVariable.name: bou1.use_C_in
ScalarVariable.description: Get the trace substances from the input connector

ScalarVariable.name: bou1.use_T_in
ScalarVariable.description: Get the temperature from the input connector

ScalarVariable.name: bou1.use_X_in
ScalarVariable.description: Get the composition (all fractions) from the input connector

ScalarVariable.name: bou1.use_Xi_in
ScalarVariable.description: Get the composition (independent fractions) from the input connector

ScalarVariable.name: bou1.use_p_in
ScalarVariable.description: Get the pressure from the input connector

ScalarVariable.name: bou1.verifyInputs
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to stop the simulation with an error if the medium temperature is outside its allowable range

ScalarVariable.name: plugFlowPipe.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: plugFlowPipe.disableComputeFlowResistance
ScalarVariable.description: =false to disable computation of flow resistance

ScalarVariable.name: plugFlowPipe.from_dp
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: plugFlowPipe.have_pipCap
ScalarVariable.description: = true, a mixing volume is added that corresponds to the heat capacity of the pipe wall

ScalarVariable.name: plugFlowPipe.have_symmetry
ScalarVariable.description: = false, the mixing volume is only on port_b, which improve performances, but reduces dynamic accuracy.

ScalarVariable.name: plugFlowPipe.initDelay
ScalarVariable.description: Initialize delay for a constant mass flow rate if true, otherwise start from 0

ScalarVariable.name: plugFlowPipe.linearized
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: pump.addPowerToMedium
ScalarVariable.description: Set to false to avoid any power (=heat and flow work) being added to medium (may give simpler equations)

ScalarVariable.name: pump.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: pump.computePowerUsingSimilarityLaws
ScalarVariable.description: = true, compute power exactly, using similarity laws. Otherwise approximate.

ScalarVariable.name: pump.nominalValuesDefineDefaultPressureCurve
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to avoid warning if m_flow_nominal and dp_nominal are used to construct the default pressure curve

ScalarVariable.name: pump.per.havePressureCurve
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if default record values are being used

ScalarVariable.name: pump.per.haveWMot_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if the rated motor power is provided

ScalarVariable.name: pump.per.motorCooledByFluid
ScalarVariable.description: If true, then motor heat is added to fluid stream

ScalarVariable.name: pump.per.powerOrEfficiencyIsHydraulic
ScalarVariable.description: =true if hydraulic power or efficiency is provided, instead of total

ScalarVariable.name: pump.show_T
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if actual temperature at port is computed

ScalarVariable.name: pump.use_riseTime
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true to continuously change motor speed
